description: New york playboy is a sensual blend of wood, fruit and spice notes that makes the perfect male expression. It comes in a whimsical black flacon. Top notes of Playboy in New York are aldehydes, lime and vinyl chords. The heart introduces green apple, elemi, black pepper, followed by the base of vetiver, tonka and vanilla. Quantity: 150 ml Caution Flammable Protect from sunlight Do not apply on irritated or broken skin Keep away from sources of ignition Keep away from children Do not use near fire, flame or heat Keep away from eyes If rash develops, discontinue use
